tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: If I Ever Fall In Love

content:
(Verse 1)
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                               [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna thank you for giving me the time to breathe[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]E[/ch]
Like a rock you waited so patiently[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
While I got it together[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                 [ch]E[/ch]
While I figured it out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
I only looked but I never touched[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]
But in my heart was a picture of us[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Holding hands, making plans[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
And it's lucky for me you understand[/tab]

(Chorus)
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
What a girl wants What a girl needs[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                          [ch]E[/ch]
Whatever makes me happy and sets you free[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                            [ch]G[/ch]
And I'm thanking you for knowing exactly [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
What a girl wants What a girl needs[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]E[/ch]
Whatever keeps me in your arms [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                            [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
And I'm thanking you for giving it to me[/tab]

(Verse 2)
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                                         [ch]G[/ch]
There was a time i was blind i was so confused[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                 [ch]E[/ch]
I'd run away just to hide it all from you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                   [ch]G[/ch]
Baby you knew me better[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                             [ch]E[/ch]
Than I knew myself[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                   [ch]G[/ch]
They say if you love something let it go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                                 [ch]G[/ch]
And if it comes back its yours. Thats how you know[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
It's for keeps yea it's for sure[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                              [ch]G[/ch]
If your ready and willing to give me more[/tab]

(Chorus)

(Bridge)
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
What a girl wants What a girl needs[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Somebody sensitive, crazy, sexy, cool like you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
What a girl wants what a girl needs[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Somebody who can't come and go nobody like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
What a girl wants what a girl needs[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                                        [ch]Am[/ch]
You let a girl know how much you care about her I swear[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                               [ch]G[/ch]
You're the one who always knew[/tab]

(Chorus)
